title: LocknLock Round 1.3ltr Food Storage Containers with Lids - Airtight & Watertight, Microwave & Dishwasher Safe Food Containers with Twist Lids (115 x 178mm)
features: AIR AND WATERTIGHT - Ultra secure locking system and hollow-centre silicone seal for superior airtight lockage This airtight container is durable and will last for years to come
FREEZER AND MICROWAVE SAFE - Plan and freeze your meals or leftovers for later Use this plastic container in the microwave to reheat your delicious lunch or dinner in a few minutes
DISHWASHER SAFE - For complete convenience, this batch cooking containers is completely dishwasher safe, meaning you will save time cleaning up every day
SPACE EFFICIENCY - This food containers with lids is designed to stack different sized containers on top of one another, allowing up to 40% more storage space in the fridge or cupboards
BPA FREE - Your safety is our priority These meal prep containers with lids are BPA free and friendly to the body using superior durable and heat resistant raw materials
description: From the manufacturer Twist lockable lid 100% airtight leak proof Microwave safe Easy to use and clean Freezer safe BPA free LocknLock Twist Range An ideal range of round containers to store fresh vegetables, fruits, nuts or even pasta and rice. The LocknLock silicone seal and locking mechanism means that your favourite foods can be stored hours before eating and yet still remain as delicious and fresh as the second they were made. Easy to open and close - ultra secure twist locking system to keep your food fresh.. Multipurpose Containers - Use our containers for food or any other purpose. Different sizes available - Tall, short, wide, our round twist containers cover all you needs. LocknLock Discover our full range of LocknLock food containers. Round, rectangular, square or sets, we cover all your needs.
